<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state after RIGHT
curr_seg = current_frame.segmentation

# Check player
white_nodes = [n for n in curr_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'W']
print(f"White nodes: {len(white_nodes)}")
if white_nodes:
    print(f"Player at: {white_nodes[0]['boundary']}")

# Check yellow nodes
yellow_nodes = [n for n in curr_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'Y']
print(f"\nYellow nodes: {len(yellow_nodes)}")
for n in yellow_nodes:
    print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check blue nodes
blue_nodes = [n for n in curr_seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b']
print(f"\nBlue nodes: {len(blue_nodes)}")
for n in blue_nodes:
    print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary'][:6]}...")

# Check cross area
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print(f"\nCross area (rows 15-22, cols 12-22):")
for row in range(15, 23):
    print(f"  {row}: {ascii_lines[row][12:23]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
